Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Shinchi Nozaka, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Japan Publications Trading Co., Ltd.
No appearance by defendant J.C. Trading, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on October 29, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 29, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on November 18, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Japan Publications Trading Co., Ltd., and against the Defaulted Defendant J.C. Trading, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - 5,577,496 Japanese Yen, or at the option of the judgment debtor, the number of United States dollars which will purchase the Japanese Yen 5,577,496, at a bank-offered spot rate at or near the close of business on the banking day next before the day of payment.
Costs - $379.00 United States Dollars, for a total in the amount of 5,577,496 Japanese Yen and $379.00 United States Dollars.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
